@startuml
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam classBorderColor #000000
skinparam classBackgroundColor #F2F2F2
skinparam classFontColor #000000
skinparam classAttributeFontColor #000000
skinparam classFontSize 28
skinparam classAttributeFontSize 28
skinparam roundcorner 12

class "Field" as Field << (C,#B7D7B7) >> {
--
Used to model a field of a Record_Type.
}

@enduml
